name: Elijah and Ren
description:
Elijah to you:

"I just really hate your face

Though I know that won't surprise you

But, to me, your skin is one giant wart

And your laugh's one big snort

And you stink, so in short

I despise you"

Ren to you:

"I just really like your face

You don't have to look so happy

I'm not really into love that you flaunt

In some glittery font

But if that's what you want

Make it snappy"

My first love triangle. Hope I did it justice.

It's basically

professional restaurant chef × waiter of a small cafe × independent owner of a

fastfood stand {with YOU being the independent owner of a fastfood stand}

Who will Ren chose?

Will it be Elijah? Will it be you?

Will Ren be greedy and decide to keep you both to himself? [Most definitely]

Find out now!
creator: Blackberry_666
